title: Vanilla & Askew MUSIC COMBINATION PACK
body:
Who saw this coming???!!!



Me!! I made it :D!!!



Finally!! Your two favorite sound events can be one!! I really hope you like: melodies!!!



This pack makes it entirely random whether you get an Old MC Song, New MC Song, or a MC Askew song :D!!!



Minecraft Askew is a huge pack with a COMPLETE Audio Overhaul! The first of it's kind!!



[CHECK OUT THE FULL PACK HERE!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-askew)



And now we can reunite its funny little tunes with it's father!!



LEGAL NOTICE(i guess): This pack doesn't actually contain the music created by C418 or Microsoft(that is illegal :D!), it just tells Minecraft to grab them from it's own source code! Which is great because otherwise this download would take 1 year(s)!!



No Optifine or Mipmap Altering needed! Will work with all current versions of Minecraft :)!!

I’ve made a convenient visual album of the Askew music available on YouTube here:

[Minecraft: Askew | FULL ALBUM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uS_QptSd_C0)

PLEASE!! I don’t want to sound like a beggar! But I worked so hard on this pack, and it would mean the world if you could spare a couple bucks,
thanks boss :)!

[Support Minecraft: Askew on Ko-Fi!](https://ko-fi.com/pikes)

Album available on:


Spotify

Apple Music

Soundcloud

Bandcamp


And pretty much everywhere else you get music!:)!!
